sonnet_review.biasedText: Kid Rock buried Puerto Rican rapper Bad Bunny in the gossip site TMZ's poll
sonnet_review.reason: I flagged the same 'buried' word choice as sensational and loaded. Sonnet correctly identifies this.

sonnet_review.biasedText: The poll may not have gone exactly how TMZ expected
sonnet_review.reason: I flagged this as mind reading. Sonnet labels it as Spin but correctly identifies the mind-reading aspect in its explanation. The detection is valid.

sonnet_review.biasedText: TMZ tried its best to lead its fans to pick Bad Bunny
sonnet_review.reason: I flagged this exact text as mind reading, attributing manipulative intent to TMZ without evidence.

sonnet_review.biasedText: Fans did not fall for the push…
sonnet_review.reason: I flagged this same text as mind reading. Sonnet labels it Spin, but the explanation correctly captures the bias of assuming manipulation and fan resistance.

sonnet_review.biasedText: it seems that nearly half of Super Bowl viewers tuned out of the league's Bad Bunny Halftime Show
sonnet_review.reason: I flagged this as an unsubstantiated claim. Sonnet captures the issue of vague sourcing and loaded interpretation with 'tuned out.'
I flagged this exact phrase both as Spin and as a subjective qualifying adjective. 'Rabidly' is clearly a pejorative, loaded descriptor.

gpt_review.biasedText: Kid Rock buried Puerto Rican rapper Bad Bunny in the gossip site TMZ's poll
gpt_review.reason: I flagged the same 'buried' language as loaded and sensational.

gpt_review.biasedText: TMZ tried its best to lead its fans to pick Bad Bunny by characterizing the rabidly anti-Trump rapper's show as taking place on 'one of the world's biggest stages,' while merely saying that Kid Rock 'tried to outshine' Bad Bunny.
gpt_review.reason: I flagged both the 'TMZ tried its best to lead its fans' portion and the 'rabidly anti-Trump' portion. GPT combines them into one detection, which is valid.

gpt_review.biasedText: The poll may not have gone exactly how TMZ expected as Kid Rock soared ahead...before TMZ shut the poll down.
gpt_review.reason: I flagged both the TMZ expectations assumption and the 'soared ahead' language. GPT correctly notes the implied intentional action in closing the poll as well.

gpt_review.biasedText: Fans did not fall for the push…
gpt_review.reason: I flagged this exact text as mind reading, and GPT correctly identifies the assumed manipulation and fan motive attribution.

gpt_review.biasedText: According to some of the latest statistics, it seems that nearly half of Super Bowl viewers tuned out of the league's Bad Bunny Halftime Show.
gpt_review.reason: I flagged this as unsubstantiated claims. GPT frames it as bias by omission due to lack of sourcing and balance, which is a valid characterization.

gpt_review.biasedText: in a strange turn of events, rapper Bad Bunny wiped all his social media accounts immediately after his Super Bowl performance.
gpt_review.reason: I flagged this same passage as Slant, noting it implies something negative without context. GPT correctly identifies the sensationalism of 'strange turn of events.'

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Kid Rock soared ahead of Bad Bunny
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Sonnet did not separately flag 'soared ahead' as sensational language dramatizing the poll margin, though it was partially captured in the TMZ expectations detection.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: rapper Bad Bunny wiped all his social media accounts immediately after his Super Bowl performance
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Sonnet missed the contextless placement of this detail at the end of the article, which implies something negative about Bad Bunny's performance without providing any context or explanation.

gpt_false_negatives.biasedText: Kid Rock soared ahead of Bad Bunny
gpt_false_negatives.reason: GPT included this within a broader detection but did not specifically call out 'soared ahead' as sensational language separate from the mind-reading claim.
While GPT included this phrase within a broader Spin detection, it did not specifically flag the pejorative adjective 'rabidly' as a subjective qualifying adjective deserving separate attention.
